case_title: DONALD CONNER JR ET AL VS. KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $160.50) SERVED OCT-19-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CANNADY, DERRAN
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $140.50) SERVED OCT-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CANNADY, CYNTHIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125.50) SERVED OCT-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DCMC FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A WYOMING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-02-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS DONALD CONNER, JR AND CHRISTIANE CONNER PRESENT. DEFENDANT KITCHEN EPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAMES FRANCHINI, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT DERRAN CANNADY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CANNADEY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DCMC FAMILY LIMITED PRTNERSHIP, A WYOMING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5255 TO THE PLAINTIFF (COSTS INCLUDED). DEFENDANT KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC., ABSORBS THE SHARED COSTS FOR THE DEFENDANTS. A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $5255 WAS TENDERED IN COURT. DEFENDANT DCMC FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A WYOMING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-02-2022 HEARING IF THE CHECK HAS NOT CLEARED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $220.50) SERVED OCT-18-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **GRANTED**
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CONNER JR, DONALD CONNER-BRAUN, CHRISTIANE AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN EXPERTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC CANNADY, DERRAN CANNADY, CYNTHIA DCMC FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A WYOMING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
